name: HTS_STAFF_GRID_VALUES
description: Table holding the Schedule Staffing grid and Dynamic Flex field Values

columns.Name: GRID_VALUE_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key. Unique system generated identifier for a Staffing Plan

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: ENTERPRISE_ID

columns.Name: STAFF_GRID_ID
columns.Comments: Unique Id of Parent table

columns.Name: SKILL_ID
columns.Comments: Skill ID

columns.Name: SHIFT_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Shift Type

columns.Name: START_TIME_OFFSET
columns.Comments: Start Time offset

columns.Name: STOP_TIME_OFFSET
columns.Comments: End Time Offset

columns.Name: STAFF_PLAN_SKILL_ID
columns.Comments: Plan Job or filtered skill ID without qualification

columns.Name: CONTENT_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: Content type, Qualification, or Competency

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: PLAN_GRID_CONFIG_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to Staffing Plan Grid Configuration table

columns.Name: RATIO_OVERRIDE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates the ratios from the Staffing Plan Grid Configuration database are overridden.

columns.Name: CALC_TYPE
columns.Comments: Ratio Calculation Type

columns.Name: MIN_STAFF_VALUE
columns.Comments: Minimum Value

columns.Name: RATIO_STAFF_VALUE
columns.Comments: Staffing Value used to calculate the ratio

columns.Name: RATIO_SEGMENT_VOLUME
columns.Comments: Segment Volume used to calculate the ratio
